---
title: Convert Cortex Differentiation Data to RDS
---

Read the processed h5ad and save as an RDS for use in R workflows.

```{r}
library(anndataR)
library(fs)

data_dir <- "../data"

sce <- read_h5ad(path(data_dir, "DevVIS_scRNA_processed.h5ad"))
saveRDS(sce, path(data_dir, "DevVIS_scRNA_processed.rds"))
```
